description: Import a CAR file to create or restore a repository on this PDS. Admin only.

main.description: Import a full repository from a CAR stream. Used for migration and disaster recovery.

errors.name: InvalidRequest
errors.description: Missing DID parameter or invalid CAR data.

errors.name: RepoAlreadyExists
errors.description: A repository already exists for this DID.

errors.name: InvalidCar
errors.description: CAR data is malformed or cannot be parsed.
